title: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita 2023 Section 69
text:
Title: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita 2023 Section 69
Citation: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023, section 69
Jurisdiction: india
Source URL: https://www.indiacode.nic.in/handle/123456789/20062

Section 69 is titled Sexual intercourse by employing deceitful means, etc. Whoever, by deceitful means or by making promise to marry to a woman without any intention of fulfilling the same, has sexual intercourse with her, such sexual intercourse not amounting to the offence of rape, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years and shall also be liable to fine.

Explanation. Deceitful means shall include inducement for, or false promise of employment or promotion, or marrying by suppressing identity.
importance_reason: primary India statute text for BNS section 69

title: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita 2023 Section 103
text:
Title: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita 2023 Section 103
Citation: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023, section 103
Jurisdiction: india
Source URL: https://www.indiacode.nic.in/handle/123456789/20062

Section 103 provides the punishment for murder. Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
importance_reason: primary India statute text for murder punishment under BNS
